name: US W-2 / Pay Stub
description: US tax forms and pay stubs (W-2, W-4, 1099, generic paystubs). Detects SSN, EIN, US dates, US ZIP codes, US phone numbers, bank routing numbers, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts (wages are sensitive on tax forms).

patterns.name: EIN (Employer ID)
patterns.description: US Employer Identification Number — XX-XXXXXXX format

patterns.name: US ZIP Code
patterns.description: US ZIP — 5 digits or ZIP+4 format

patterns.name: US phone number
patterns.description: US phone numbers — (XXX) XXX-XXXX or XXX-XXX-XXXX, optional +1

patterns.name: Driver License (generic US)
patterns.description: US driver license number (varies by state, generic pattern)
